conversation_history.content: Hello! I can help you with loan eligibility. Could you please provide your Monthly Income, Existing EMI, Down Payment, and Loan Tenure (in years or months)?
income 50000, emi 80000, down payment 2 lakh, 5 years

I've noted your down payment of ₹2,00,000 and tenure of 5 years. However, your EMI of ₹80,000 cannot exceed your monthly income of ₹50,000. Could you please provide a valid EMI and your monthly income?
I've noted your existing EMI of ₹20,000. Could you please provide your Monthly Income?
I've noted your monthly income of ₹100,000. Thank you for providing all the details!
